Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}It's been a long time since we talked like this in your room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Though back then, I had a different form and a different name.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Though back then, I had a different form and a different name.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}It seems like you all decided to let me live.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}You're all going to risk your lives on a battle you can't win.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But they're not the ones here right now—you are.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}If you kill me, Tartarus, the Dark Hour, and the memories of your battles will all disappear.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Tomorrow, you'll wake up as a normal high school student.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}You'll be able to live in peace until the moment of the Fall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}But if you let me live, you'll spend every waking moment until that day dreading your inevitable death.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Nyx can't be defeated. It's pointless to fight her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Or have you already made up your mind?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My decision determines {f 0 1 2}the rest of our lives{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I must choose wisely.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I think looking to the future is a great way to live.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But that doesn't mean other ways of living are wrong.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}No one knows which road will lead to happiness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}I guess I wasn't able to change your mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}There's still some time until midnight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I didn't want to have to show you this... But I have no choice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Do you see? I am not human.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I will bring death to this world until I am finally satiated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}There is no need to hesitate over killing me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Now consider this very carefully.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Is confronting Nyx really what everyone wants?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Some things in this world cannot be changed. That's something you can't comprehend.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Memories are not set in stone. Old ones can be replaced with new ones, creating a new reality.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Don't you think you should put a stop to everyone's pain and suffering?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}It's up to you. Only you can make this decision.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Now... this is your last chance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Tell me your answer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}More than anything, I don't want to see you suffer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}After all, you're someone very special to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have to make my decision now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My answer is...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}As sad as I am to hear it, it's your life. You're free to do what you want with it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I need to tell you guys how to confront Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}I know you better than anyone, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I have this feeling like... I always wanted to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}That's why I came back to you as Ryoji Mochizuki.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Maybe there really is some power out there that can do the impossible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I know this isn't exactly the best timing, but I never thought I'd feel this way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You have forged a powerful bond with Ryoji! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Saturnus{f 0 1 27}, the black sun![n]{f 1 1}
